headline: Russell Martin — update
body: 🚨🦊 Russell Martin has just signed his contract as new Leicester City head coach. Club statement expected in next 24h. https://t.co/5fUx5P5HKn
text:
🚨🦊 Russell Martin has just signed his contract as new Leicester City head coach.

Club statement expected in next 24h. https://t.co/5fUx5P5HKn
